message:
fix(sse): use explicit match for SSE retry field parsing

Replace the terse `value.parse().ok()` one-liner for the SSE "retry"
field with an explicit `if let Ok(retry_val)` block. The previous form
silently swallowed parse errors into None, making it invisible whether
retry was absent or malformed. The new form makes the success path
explicit while still ignoring unparseable values per the SSE spec.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
